_comment: FAQ accordion content. Edit here — no code changes needed.
label: Questions
heading: Everything advertisers ask us.

items.q: How much does a hoarding campaign cost?
items.a: Rates depend on city, junction, size, and lighting. A prime Patna site reads very differently from a highway gantry. Send us your target cities on WhatsApp and you'll have a site-by-site rate card within one working day.

items.q: What is the minimum booking period?
items.a: One month for static hoardings and two weeks for digital LED slots. For launches we also run short high-intensity bursts across multiple sites — ask us about launch packages.

items.q: How do I know my ad is actually up?
items.a: Every campaign gets photographic proof-of-display — geotagged photos of every site, every month, delivered to your inbox. It has been our standard practice since 1998, not an add-on.

items.q: How fast can you put a campaign live?
items.a: 72 hours from artwork approval to live sites, including printing and installation — our printing and fabrication units are in-house, so there is no vendor queue.

items.q: Do you handle permits and municipal approvals?
items.a: Yes, end-to-end. All our structures are licensed, engineering-certified, and audited annually. You never deal with a municipal office — that's our job.

items.q: Can you design the creative too?
items.a: Our in-house studio handles artwork, adaptation, and print files at no extra design fee for confirmed campaigns. Bring a brief or a finished file — either works.
